references.hebrew: תּוֹרָ֥ה צִוָּה־לָ֖נוּ מֹשֶׁ֑ה מוֹרָשָׁ֖ה קְהִלַּ֥ת יַעֲקֹֽב׃
references.english:
When Moses charged us with the Teaching
As the heritage of the congregation of Jacob.

references.hebrew: וּשְׁמַרְתֶּ֤ם אֶת־חֻקֹּתַי֙ וְאֶת־מִשְׁפָּטַ֔י אֲשֶׁ֨ר יַעֲשֶׂ֥ה אֹתָ֛ם הָאָדָ֖ם וָחַ֣י בָּהֶ֑ם אֲנִ֖י יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
references.english: You shall keep My laws and My rules, by the pursuit of which humans shall live: I am G<small>OD</small>.
references.matched_snippet: אשר יעשה אתם האדם וחי בהם

references.hebrew: רַ֣ק חֲזַ֗ק לְבִלְתִּי֙ אֲכֹ֣ל הַדָּ֔ם כִּ֥י הַדָּ֖ם ה֣וּא הַנָּ֑פֶשׁ וְלֹא־תֹאכַ֥ל הַנֶּ֖פֶשׁ עִם־הַבָּשָֽׂר׃
references.english: But make sure that you do not partake of the blood; for the blood is the life, and you must not consume the life with the flesh.

commentary_links.hebrew: וַיִּֽזְרַֽח־ל֣וֹ הַשֶּׁ֔מֶשׁ כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר עָבַ֖ר אֶת־פְּנוּאֵ֑ל וְה֥וּא צֹלֵ֖עַ עַל־יְרֵכֽוֹ׃
commentary_links.english: The sun rose upon him as he passed Penuel, limping on his hip.
You must not, however, eat flesh with its life-blood in it.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: הדם מן החי תנו רבנן אך בשר בנפשו דמו
